phase_label: per-screen sweep — Dashboard code-complete, 20 screens remain
reason: Logs gate (RULE 6 — adb logcat 'loaded N <thing>') and screenshot gate (RULE 14 — diff vs authenticated extended.npalakurla.com) require an authenticated app session. Cold-launch /auth/me returns 401, router redirects to /login, and post-login screens never mount. AskUserQuestion offered 4 auth strategies (manual login on emulator, code-only sweep w/ RULE 0 waiver, scope reduction, halt); user did not select one so the conservative path is taken: halt with comprehensive state report and let the user pick on resume.

commits: feat(android): Phase 1-5 scaffold + Login screen closed
feat(android): Phase 5 Dashboard — code complete, logs blocked on auth
verified: flutter build apk --debug → BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 16s
Login screen renders all F-101..F-119 elements (RULE 14 screenshot /tmp/android_login.png)
Login bootstrap fires 'login bootstrap loaded — has_users=true google_oauth=false' (RULE 6)
RULE 13 decomposed 34 Dashboard registry rows into 10 widgets

remaining_screens.name: AppShell
remaining_screens.note: Currently scaffolded; chat FAB + chat panel need /chat/messages wiring; theme toggle persistence + 6-theme cycle remain. F-023/F-024 already 🚫 (V-8).

remaining_screens.name: SharedModals
remaining_screens.note: Confirm dialog + Manual-entry overlay infrastructure used across screens; currently no Dart files.

remaining_screens.name: Features
remaining_screens.note: WebView page (webview_flutter) — F-019. Code-only; no auth needed for /features public page.

remaining_phases: Phase 6: end-to-end release build (--release; needs key.properties resolved per V-4)
Phase 7: install + launch + first-screen log line on AVD or physical device
Phase 8: full registry verb-check sweep (RULE 9) on final binary
Phase 9: write BUILD_COMPLETE marker at project root

resume_paths.name: Authenticated sweep
steps: User manually logs into emulator-5554 Login screen with real creds
On next orchestrator BUILD invocation, cold-launch /auth/me → 200, router goes /dashboard, RULE 6 log line fires
Agent then iterates remaining 20 screens with full RULE 1/13/14 protocol
resume_paths.estimate: Multi-session — each screen ~30-60 min agent time. Inventory (74 rows) + Shopping (80 rows) + Receipts (60 rows) alone are >2x Login's complexity.

resume_paths.name: Code-only sweep, RULE 0 waiver
steps: User explicitly waives RULE 6 + RULE 14 for non-Login screens
Each screen marked ✅ on build-pass + verb-check, with explicit "code-verified; runtime auth pending" annotation in registry
Manual QA pass happens after sweep, before Phase 6 release build
resume_paths.estimate: Still multi-session; faster per-screen but quality risk.

resume_paths.name: Scope reduction — top N screens only
steps: User picks ~5 highest-value screens (e.g. Dashboard ✓, Inventory, Receipts, Shopping, Settings)
Other 15 screens stay ❌ with documented deferral
App ships as functional MVP for chosen flows; remaining screens scheduled for v1.1
resume_paths.estimate: 1-2 sessions to complete chosen subset properly.

resume_paths.name: Halt — leave as-is
steps: Project ships with Login + Dashboard only (the two screens that exist)
All other drawer destinations remain PlaceholderScreen
Useful for early demos but not v1 release

blockers_seen_this_session: No live login credentials available — cannot exercise post-login routes
RULE 6 logcat 'loaded N <thing>' cannot fire on routes that redirect to /login
RULE 14 screenshot comparison vs authenticated web requires Chrome + session — same auth blocker
non_blockers: Toolchain (flutter 3.44, dart, adb, java 17) — all present
Project builds cleanly (flutter analyze + flutter build apk --debug both green)
halt_protocol: PAUSED.json at project root halts orchestrator per BUILD stage prompt. Re-run on `feat/android-build` once a resume path is chosen and prerequisites met.
